title: Split Shed and Tub Change logging into separate actions on AnimalCard and reflect in history UI

requirements.summary: Replace the combined "Shed & Tub Change" action on AnimalCard with two independent side-by-side buttons for logging Shed and Tub Change separately, with independent pending states and toasts.
acceptanceCriteria: In AnimalCard, the combined "Shed & Tub Change" button is removed and replaced by two buttons labeled clearly (e.g., "Log Shed" and "Log Tub Change") displayed side-by-side in the same actions area.
Clicking "Log Shed" creates only a shed record for that animal; clicking "Log Tub Change" creates only a tub change record for that animal.
Both buttons show appropriate loading/disabled state while their respective mutation is pending and show success/error toast messages that match the action taken.
No changes are made to bulk actions dialogs or their UI.

file_operations.description: Replace the single "Shed & Tub Change" button with two separate buttons ("Log Shed" and "Log Tub Change") rendered side-by-side within the existing actions grid; wire each to its own mutation, use independent disabled/loading labels, and show action-specific success/error toasts. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add dedicated frontend mutation hooks for shed-only and tub-change-only logging and ensure related queries/metrics are invalidated so the UI updates after logging.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend has two separate mutation hooks usable by AnimalCard: one that logs shed-only and one that logs tub-change-only.
Triggering either mutation invalidates/refetches the relevant per-animal history queries and the derived "animalsWithEvents"/days-since metrics so UI badges and history update after logging.
Backend methods (if added) enforce the same access control rules as existing animal event logging and do not affect other event types.
Existing combined logging functionality (if currently used elsewhere) continues to work or is cleanly replaced without breaking other screens.

file_operations.description: Add/wire React Query mutations for shed-only and tub-change-only logging using the existing backend actor capabilities (logShedOnly, logTubChangeOnly); ensure onSuccess invalidates per-animal shed/tub history queries and global derived metrics queries (including animalsWithEvents) so AnimalCard badges and ShedTubChangeList update. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update imports/usage to consume the new useLogShedOnly and useLogTubChangeOnly mutation hooks (and remove reliance on the combined mutation for the AnimalCard UI). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Adjust Shed/Tub Change history row labels and edit/delete dialog copy to reflect whether the combined entry contains shed-only, tub-change-only, or both.
acceptanceCriteria: In the ShedTubChangeList, each rendered history row indicates what is present for that row (Shed only, Tub Change only, or Shed & Tub Change).
Delete confirmation text and success/error toasts reflect what is being deleted (shed, tub change, or both) based on the combined entry contents.
Edit dialog title/description similarly reflects whether the user is editing a shed date, a tub change date, or both, while still allowing editing of whichever records exist in that combined entry.

file_operations.description: Compute a per-row label based on whether shedEntry and/or tubChangeEntry exist, and render the correct label ("Shed", "Tub Change", or "Shed & Tub Change"); update delete confirmation title/description and delete success/error toasts to match the entry contents. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the dialog title/description and success/error toasts to reflect whether the user is editing Shed only, Tub Change only, or both (while still updating whichever record(s) exist). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
